title: Tikona Infinet
description: ***.in rocketreach.co/tikona-profile_b5c0d28cf42e0851 Tikona Infinet Private Limited is a prominent Indian telecommunications company based in Mumbai, established in 2008. They specialize in providing high-performance wireless broadband connectivity and advanced cloud solutions. The company serves a diverse client base, including residential homes, small businesses, and large enterprises across India, with a focus on delivering reliable next-generation internet service
